message:
feat(tui): use shlex for shell-safe command argument parsing

Replace naive command.split_whitespace() in TUI command handoff with
shlex::split(command) for proper shell-aware argument parsing. This
handles quoted arguments correctly (e.g., echo "hello quoted world")
and returns a structured error for unbalanced quotes/escape sequences
instead of panicking.

- Add shlex dependency to frankenterm-core
- Two new tests: unbalanced quote error reporting, shell-quoted
  argument support

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
